entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange aggregator providing routed token swaps across EVM and non-EVM networks through a public application, API, SDK, and widget integrations.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation and the live website identify OpenOcean as an active non-custodial multichain DEX aggregator. They document swap routing, liquidity aggregation, quote and execution flows, limit orders, cross-chain functions, APIs, SDKs, and a public trading application. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: OpenOcean API documentation introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies OpenOcean as a multichain DEX aggregator connecting liquidity sources and routing user-signed token swaps across EVM and non-EVM networks.

evidence.title: OpenOcean official trading and developer website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website links the live application and exposes spot trading, swaps, limit orders, cross-chain functions, liquidity routing, API documentation, and developer integrations.
